notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Connor Joe grounds into a force out, shortstop Marcelo Mayer to second baseman Anthony Seigler. Cole Young out at 2nd. Connor Joe advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Anthony Seigler.

notableEvents.label: Marcelo Mayer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcelo Mayer grounds into a double play, third baseman J.P. Crawford to shortstop Colt Emerson to first baseman Josh Naylor. Caleb Durbin out at 2nd. Marcelo Mayer out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Narváez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Narváez reaches on a fielding error by left fielder Connor Joe. Carlos Narváez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher José A. Ferrer. Wilyer Abreu scores. Willson Contreras to 3rd. Jarren Duran to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Narváez reaches on a fielding error by left fielder Connor Joe. Carlos Narváez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Canzone pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Canzone lines out sharply to second baseman Andruw Monasterio.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
